programmes.show_description: Noel finds a discarded positive pregnancy test. And if that wasn't enough of a shock for him, then that's nothing compared to the new mum-to-be... And Noel and Sue travel to Dubai.
As a new school term begins, the Radford house is in for a major upheaval. And when Sue becomes unusually distant, Noel is convinced she is hiding something from the family.
Among today's challenges, in Harrogate Paul and David Elstob try to find items they can flip for profit at auction. With little time and a limited budget, will they find hidden treasures? (Ep37)

Jessica Fletcher must uncover the link between numerous break-ins in New York and the murder of a sleazy aspiring entrepreneur whose body is found in a salon.
Jessica suspects foul play when her friend's estranged husband is killed in what appears to be an accident.
Crime writer and amateur sleuth Jessica Fletcher is invited to the desert town of Gila Junction by a friend who suspects it is the site of dangerous chemical experiments.
A haunted spirit and antique smugglers are just a few challenges Jessica faces on her Irish vacation.
Jessica is trapped in the dungeon of an ancient Irish castle, but uses her ingenuity to get rescued and find the treasure and a murderer.
Jessica rewrites a movie beset with artistic and financial problems. When a stunt man dies, the director is charged with murder, but it's up to Jessica to find the real killer.
Charlie Garrett's outrageous bid at an auction arouses Jessica's suspicions after the artist becomes the subject of a homicide.
Gary and Larry's accountant is found dead. Then $750,000 earmarked for Jessica's Literacy Fund is found missing. It's up to Jessica to find the killer.
Jessica finds herself in contempt of a federal grand jury after she is subpoenaed to testify in a hearing over a corrupt investment firm and the key witness dies.
On a visit to Japan, Jessica meets up with one of her former students who is being forced into an arranged marriage. Jessica steps in to solve the murder when the groom is found dead.
